questions.text: Which of the following categories of forests are regarded as the most valuable as far as the conservation of nature is concerned?
questions.explanation: Reserved forests are considered most valuable for conservation; more than half of the total forest land has been declared reserved.

questions.text: The Buxa Tiger Reserve in West Bengal is seriously threatened by:
questions.explanation: The ongoing dolomite mining in the Buxa Tiger Reserve has caused severe ecological damage and blocked migration routes of animals.

questions.text: Species which are in danger of extinction are known as:
questions.explanation: Endangered species are those whose population has declined to levels where they are at risk of disappearing entirely.

questions.text: In which year was the Indian Wildlife (Protection) Act implemented?
questions.explanation: The Indian Wildlife (Protection) Act was implemented in 1972 with various provisions for protecting habitats and species.

questions.text: Which state has the largest area under permanent forests?
questions.explanation: Madhya Pradesh has the largest area under permanent forests, constituting 75% of its total forest area.
